ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, support) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the contact type (e.g., customer, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the contact */,
  "contact_type" INTEGER /* Type of contact (e.g., business, investor) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the contact */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the contact's profile picture */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company with which the contact is associated */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the contact in the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_contact_type FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type") REFERENCES contact_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., meeting, call, email) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the interaction */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact group */,
  "group_category" TEXT /* Category of the contact group (e.g., customer, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_group_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being assigned */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group to which the contact is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_group_assignments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES contact_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_group_assignments_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contacts" (
  "project_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project contact association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact associated with the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contact in the project */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the contact to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contacts_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contacts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the task belongs */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is assigned */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., update, complete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the action */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES project_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the file belongs */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., document, image, spreadsheet) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the note belongs */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
